column1: # Every row binds to exactly one `terminal-control-branch: <branch_id>` source
# marker. TC-TERMCTRL-073 runs the suite under xtrace and verifies every
# covered marker executes and every uncovered marker remains explicit.
B002|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-011|comment provider returns a malformed envelope
B003|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-001|comment provider returns a valid array
B006|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-010|write rejects an invalid intent id
B007|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-010|write rejects an invalid invocation id
B012|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-002|exact trusted write replay is a no-op
B017|uncovered|-|read jq program fails after array validation
B021|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-015|consume rejects an invalid intent id
B023|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-006|current consume replay is a no-op
B028|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-015|clear rejects an invalid intent id
B031|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-007|current clear replay is a no-op
B035|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-027|label provider returns a malformed envelope
B041|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-026|pending helper rejects an invalid issue
B042|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-026|pending helper rejects an invalid intent id
B043|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-020|pending helper accepts its state domain
B044|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-026|pending helper rejects an active state
B046|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-026|active helper rejects an invalid issue
B047|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-026|active helper rejects an invalid intent id
B048|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-022|active helper accepts its state domain
B049|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-026|active helper rejects a pending state
B057|uncovered|-|cleanup read returns malformed nonempty intent JSON
B063|covered|TC-TERMCTRL-016|operator clear suppresses a stale consume
